blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate tax-exemption support.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of tax-exemption support where applicable, but the evidence provided does not include any specific information regarding tax rules or exemptions. While there are multiple steps confirming bookings and financial outputs, there is no direct evidence that addresses the tax-exemption aspect. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary data to assert compliance with the requirement is missing.
